trending_videos.title: Marvel Tōkon: Fighting Souls - Fighting Avengers Trailer | PS5 & PC Games
trending_videos.description:
https://www.playstation.com/en-us/games/marvel-tokon-fighting-souls/

The Challenge of the Champion threatens the planet, and the Fighting Avengers are the third team to answer the call!

Led by Captain America and featuring Iron Man, the Fighting Avengers bring two new characters into the fight: Shuri as Black Panther, wielding her aggressive style and Wakandan weaponry, and Hulk, angrier than ever and ready to smash his opponents!

Coming to PS5® and PC on August 6th, 2026 PT!

Follow us for all the latest updates: 
Twitter: https://x.com/MARVELTokon
BlueSky: https://bsky.app/profile/marveltokon.bsky....
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/MARVELTokon/
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/marveltokon/
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@marveltokon
 
© 2025 MARVEL 
©2026 Sony Interactive Entertainment Inc. 
Developed by ARC SYSTEM WORKS CO., LTD.

#ps5 #ps5games #pc #pcgames #marveltokonfightingsouls #marvel

trending_videos.title: Wurth 400
trending_videos.description: The Cup Series visits the 1.5-mile Texas oval. Denny Hamlin looks to secure his third victory of the season. Following a top-5 finish at Talladega, Alex Bowman seeks to navigate the high banks of turns 1 and 2 to reach the winner's circle.

gaming_focus.description: Several trending videos are related to gaming, specifically around popular franchises like Marvel and Garry's Mod.

video_titles: Marvel Tōkon: Fighting Souls - Fighting Avengers Trailer | PS5 & PC Games
data_points.total_views: Estimated high viewership due to popular gaming content.

gaming_focus.opportunity: Creating content around popular gaming franchises can attract significant viewership. Consider collaboration with gaming influencers or developers to create engaging content.

entertainment_and_reactions.description: Reaction videos and entertainment content are widely popular, indicating a high engagement trend.

DO NOT Dig A Hole With Your Friends
data_points.estimated_viewership: High due to the appeal of reaction and entertainment genres.

entertainment_and_reactions.opportunity: Invest in creating reaction content or humorous entertainment series to capitalize on viewer interest.

sports_and_news.description: Sports and news content remain relevant, with notable mentions in the trending list.

data_points.appeal: Sports and news content attract loyal viewership, especially around major events.

sports_and_news.opportunity: Develop content around live sports events and trending news topics to capture timely engagement.

diversified_channels.description: A variety of channels with different focus areas are trending, indicating diverse audience interests.
diversified_channels.opportunity: Creators can explore cross-genre content to tap into varied audience segments and increase reach.

cross-promotion.description: With top channels having only one video each in the trending list, cross-channel promotion can enhance visibility.
cross-promotion.strategy: Channels can collaborate on thematic content series or guest appearances to leverage audiences from different niches.

audience_engagement.description: High engagement potential in gaming and entertainment content implies a market for interactive formats.
audience_engagement.strategy: Utilize live streams, Q&A sessions, and interactive polls to enhance viewer participation and retention.
